mapper.sql: id, username, password, email, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into user (username, password, email, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select:
select
from user where id = #{id} and status = 1

select count(1) from user
status = 1
and username like CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
and email = #{email}
mapper.update: update user set status = 0, updated_at = NOW() where id = #{id}
